metadata.name: [RGON+] Arachna (25+ Unlocks!) | Update 2.0: Woven Anew!
metadata.description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/FEz0EkS.gif[/img] Become the lord of the spiders with [b]Arachna[/b] - a new character, that revolves around web and spiders. Now back with full [b]Repentance+[/b] and [url=https://repentogon.com/]REPENTOGON[/url] support! [b]Arachna[/b] starts with a new item in her pocket active - [b]Arachna's Spool[/b]. She can throw it at enemies to create web that slows them down and turns them into spider eggs, that burst into a bunch of colorful spiders when you finish the room! [b]Create your very own spider army[/b] to turn a once hostile basement into a park for your insectoid pals! [img]https://i.imgur.com/bTv2nlz.png[/img] • [b]Arachna[/b] - a unique spider-based character, and her Tainted counterpart (which [b]plays a lot different in 2.0![/b]). • [b]New heart type:[/b] Web Hearts. • [b]20[/b] new items. • [b]3[/b] new trinkets. • [b]3[/b] consumables. • [b]New shopkeeper type![/b] • [b]A new beggar.[/b] • [b]20[/b] new friendly spider variants! • [b]Tons[/b] of item costumes. • And [b][i]...secrets?[/i][/b] Nah, there aren't any!
If you'd like to know more details about mod's contents, feel free to visit [url=https://moddingofisaac.wiki.gg/wiki/Arachna]an official wiki[/url]. [img]https://i.imgur.com/TO2ZLyT.png[/img] Arachna is [b]compatible with most of your favorite mods[/b] like [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2575911103]Specialist[/url], [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3012430463]Epiphany[/url], [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2851063440]Fiend Folio[/url] and others! More detailed list can be found [url=https://moddingofisaac.wiki.gg/wiki/Arachna/Mod_Compatibility]here[/url] or in the in-game [b]Dead Sea Scolls[/b] menu (press [b]"C"[/b] in the starting room to open it). [img]https://i.imgur.com/hTblSRx.png[/img] Version 2.0 was brought to you by [b]Benny[/b], who did majority of the code work here, while I ([b]rvsty[/b], solo dev of 1.0 version) was mostly responsible for graphics and game design this time. Additionally, here is a list of people who also contributed to the mod's development in one or another way: • [b]BrakeDude[/b] - Coded in Web Hearts in v1.0 and helped with some small things in code for v2.0. • [b]UnknownTheHero[/b], [b]RackJet[/b], People of [b]Benny's Barn Discord server[/b] - Playtesting. • [b]Quartz[/b], [b]damagazz[/b], [b]ferpe[/b] - Barious spritework. • [b]wons[/b] - Several costume sprites, playtesting, Polish EID translation. • [url=https://x.com/ZVetaji6]zvetaji6[/url] - 3D animation. • [b]Connor (+his wife)[/b] - A lot of help regarding Specialist compatibility. • [b]oucalgarlin[/b], [b]Saurtya[/b], [b]jaro7126[/b], [b]Nebuka[/b] - Various EID translations. • [b]cadetpirx[/b] - Idea of a certain new consumable. • [url=https://twitter.com/ShaPatSmith]ShaPatSmith[/url] - Voiceover for collectibles. • [b]SteamJek[/b], [b]Picsel[/b] - mod cover art as a commission. [img]https://i.imgur.com/MfGJVqX.png[/img] [b]P.S.[/b]: Legacy edition of the mod for [b]regular Repentance[/b] is avaible [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2801120315] here[/url], or, if you're playing on unofficial version of the game, [b][url=https://github.com/BenevolusGoat/arachna-mod/tree/legacy]here[/url][/b].
